fillEmailPassword: Please enter your email and password.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.subtitle: We'll send you a link to reset your password
reset.sentBody: If <0>{{email}}</0> is registered with us, a password-reset link will be sent.

update.pwTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
update.title: Choose a new password

update.doneBody: You can continue to the app with your new password.

errors.alreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. You can log in.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password is too short — at least 6 characters.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before logging in.
errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts — please try again in a moment.
errors.providerDisabled: Google sign-in isn't set up for this project yet.
errors.samePassword: Your new password must be different from the old one.
errors.sessionExpired: The link has expired. Please request a new reset link.
errors.generic: Something went wrong — please try again.
